---
title: "Epiweek 5, 2026"
date: 2026-02-01
categories: [2026, Q1]
description: "Weekly IDSR summary: Category 1 & 2 notifications, confirmed trends, and epitable for 01 February – 07 February 2026."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Reporting period: **01 February – 07 February 2026** (CDC Epiweek 5, 2026)
:::

[View Report](../rendered/2026-W05-weekly-report.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[Download Word](../rendered/2026-W05-weekly-report.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="2026-W05-weekly-report.docx"}
